name: Spoon Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Gradually add cornmeal to boiling water, stirring constantly until the mixture begins to thicken.
2. Allow the mixture to cool slightly.
3. Mix in melted shortening, salt, egg yolks, sour milk, and baking soda. Stir for about 2 minutes.
4. Fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites into the batter.
5. Pour the batter into a well-oiled baking dish.
6. Bake in a hot oven (435°F) for approximately 40 minutes.
